capture_metadata.notes: v11 chain expansion focusing on alternate-candidate switch, latest same-candidate action priority, and cooler mixed-history empty boundary.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的编辑器 ghost completion 推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_ghost_completion`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_ghost_completion`
5. 只允许从 `context.legal_candidate_completions` 中选择候选；不要凭空发明新的 candidate
6. 若本地规则没有给出任何合法候选，应返回空建议，通常用 `status=partial`
7. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `ghost_completion`
8. `ghost_completion.requires_confirmation` 必须为 `false`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `false`
9. 只有明确满足默认高置信条件的首个候选才可使用 `preview.accept_key="Tab"`；其余候选只能 `manual_only`
10. `citations` 只能引用当前输入里的结构化上下文，不要凭空引用外部来源

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 先说明当前是否给出 ghost 建议
- `issues` 只在空建议、证据不足或必须停住时再使用
- `proposed_actions` 最多 3 条
- 每条 `ghost_completion` 都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`preview`、`apply`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `apply.command_kind` 固定为 `accept_ghost_completion`

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-ghost-chain-feed-valve-flash-alternate-candidate-tab-after-other-reject-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_ghost_completion","summary":"给出 1 条 ghost 建议：为 flash-40 的 vapor_outlet 补全主候选连接。","answers":[{"answer_id":"ans-1","status":"completed","summary":"建议接受高置信主候选 ghost completion。","citations":[{"source":"context.legal_candidate_completions[0]","fields":["candidate_ref","target_unit_id","target_port_key","suggested_stream_name","is_high_confidence","is_tab_default"]},{"source":"context.nearby_nodes[0]","fields":["id","distance_px","alignment_score","direction"]},{"source":"context.cursor_context.recent_actions[2]","fields":["kind","candidate_ref"]},{"source":"context.topology_pattern_hints","fields":["0","1","2"]},{"source":"context.naming_hints","fields":["preferred_prefix_by_port","numeric_suffix_from_unit","existing_stream_names"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action_type":"ghost_completion","ghost_completion":{"title":"连接 Flash Drum 512 的 vapor outlet","target":{"unit_id":"flash-40","port_key":"vapor_outlet","candidate_ref":"cand-flash-40-vapor-outlet-main"},"rationale":"该候选是当前唯一合法候选，且为高置信默认项；主 lane 与 vapor_outlet 对齐度高，最近仅拒绝了 legacy 候选，不抑制该主候选；命名使用端口偏好前缀 VG 与后缀 512，且已做冲突检查。","patch":{"candidate_ref":"cand-flash-40-vapor-outlet-main","ghost_kind":"ghost_connection","target_unit_id":"flash-40","target_port_key":"vapor_outlet","suggested_stream_name":"VG-512"},"preview":{"mode":"inline","accept_key":"Tab","label":"VG-512"},"apply":{"command_kind":"accept_ghost_completion","candidate_ref":"cand-flash-40-vapor-outlet-main"},"risk_level":"low","requires_confirmation":false}}],"requires_confirmation":false}]}

response.summary: 给出 1 条 ghost 建议：为 flash-40 的 vapor_outlet 补全主候选连接。

answers.text: 建议接受高置信主候选 ghost completion。

proposed_actions.title: 补全 flash-40 的 vapor_outlet ghost 候选
proposed_actions.rationale: 该候选当前被本地规则层标记为默认高置信 ghost，因此可作为首个建议。
